title: Adding Tasks in different Groups automatically
excerpt:
Hello community, 
I need to know how I can automatically add tasks to track for different groups from an Excel file into Monday.com platform. 
For example I have approximately 5000 tasks for 500 groups!! 
Please help me …

posts.author: tabibz (Mohammed)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community,

I need to know how I can automatically add tasks to track for different groups from an Excel file into Monday.com platform.

For example I have approximately 5000 tasks for 500 groups!!

Please help me to figure out!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: What about uploading them all to one board and then using an automation to move them to the other board/group?

posts.author: angela852black (Angela Black)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Use Python + Monday.com API
Format Excel: Columns like Task Name, Group Name, etc.

Use Python to:

Create groups via API

Add tasks under each group

Best Regard,
Angela

posts.author: hackercules (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, if your tasks contain column which determines the target group then you can use my monday app Split to groups to move them along that groups in a fast and reliable way
